name: Webstar Technology Group Inc.
business: Webstar Technology Group Inc. is an early-stage specialty real estate development company focused on identifying, partnering, and developing specialty real estate projects in the United States, with an emphasis on multitenant buildings that can be upgraded to green/energy efficient status and entertainment and resort real estate development. The company's principal project is the Forge Atlanta mixed-use development in downtown Atlanta. As of the filing date, the company had generated no revenues.

exposures.sentence: The Company is currently an early-stage specialty real estate development company devoted to the identification, partnership and development of specialty real estate projects in the United States with a focus on multitenant buildings that can be upgraded to green/energy efficient status and entertainment and resort real estate development.

On February 3, 2026, Forge Atlanta Asset Management, LLC ( FAAM ), an affiliated project entity associated with Webstar Technology Group, Inc., entered into an Exchange Licensing Agreement (the Agreement ) with Torch, LLC ( Torch ).

catalysts.event: Scheduled closing date of land purchase for Forge Atlanta
catalysts.sentence: The scheduled closing date of the land purchase is November 25, 2025.

catalysts.event: Extension deadline for land purchase closing
catalysts.sentence: Forge Atlanta shall have the right to extend the closing date to February 6, 2026 by giving written notice to Seller on or before December 15, 2025 and paying a non-refundable fee of $150,000, which shall not be applied to the purchase price.

catalysts.event: Purchase Money Promissory Note maturity date
Potential extended maturity date of Purchase Money Promissory Note
catalysts.sentence: The current discussions also include extending the maturity date of the Note with MCRR to October 1, 2026 and an extension fee of $900,000 and interest totaling $1,011,000 to be repaid in each of six (6) installments of $318,500 ($168,500 applied to interest and $150,000 applied to the extension fee) due on April 15, 2026; April 30, 2026, May 30, 2026, June 30, 2026, July 30, 2026, and August 30, 2026.
